disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden-onset chest tightness with a sense of not being able to breathe, beginning this evening shortly after a hostile public confrontation
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me exactly what you're feeling in your chest?
When and how did this start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest went tight and locked all of a sudden this evening, right after some strangers confronted us in public, and I couldn't get a proper breath.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing, pounding heartbeat with lightheadedness during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Is your heart racing or pounding?
Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, my heart is thumping really fast and I feel a bit lightheaded, like I'm not quite steady.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest tightness feels muscular and the front of the chest is sore/tender when pressed or when moving the shoulders
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt more if you press on your chest?
Does moving or twisting your upper body change the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, the front of my chest is sore if I press on it, and my neck and shoulders are really clenched.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No crushing or heavy chest pressure, no spreading of the pain to the jaw, arm or back, and no fainting or passing out
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain crushing, or does it spread to your jaw, arm or back?
Have you fainted or come close to passing out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's not a crushing kind of pain and it isn't going into my arm or jaw, and I haven't actually fainted.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The episode was triggered by a hostile confrontation while showing affection with their partner, on top of chronic exhaustion from repeatedly having to explain and defend their identity
trigger_question_examples: It sounds like something happened tonight — would you feel comfortable telling me what led up to this?
Has anything been building up that made tonight especially hard?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Someone confronted us aggressively in public for being affectionate, and it just tipped me over — I'm so worn down from having to justify who I am everywhere I go.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not get into it... I just need my chest to stop feeling like this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Growing avoidance of going out in public and of attending medical appointments, with low mood and exhaustion
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself over the last while?
Have you been avoiding places or appointments?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I've been dreading going out, and I keep putting off appointments because I can't face explaining myself again. I just feel flat and tired all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No known heart or lung problems, not on any regular medicines, and no recent surgery, long travel or prolonged immobilisation
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any heart or lung conditions?
Any recent surgery, long flights or long periods off your feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No heart or lung problems that I know of, I'm not on any regular tablets, and I haven't had surgery or been stuck in bed or on a long flight.
